description: Architectual Single Source of Truth for File Paths and Governance

vox-audio-ingress.role: Minimal HTTP ingress for Oratio STT/status endpoints

vox-bootstrap.role: Host toolchain bootstrap and install plan (rustup, clang for Turso)

vox-bounded-fs.role: UTF-8 file reads capped by vox-scaling-policy max_file_bytes_hint

vox-browser.role: Chromium CDP automation backend (chromiumoxide session API)

vox-build-meta.role: Build-time metadata for feature capability manifest

vox-capability-registry.role: Transport-independent capability registry YAML + Mens chat tool descriptors

vox-checksum-manifest.role: SHA-256 release asset verification against checksums.txt manifests

vox-clavis.role: Central secret resolution and compatibility adapters for Vox

vox-cli.role: Primary `vox` CLI, CI guards, and workspace tooling

vox-compiler.role: Lexer, parser, HIR lowering, typechecking, and codegen pipeline

vox-config.role: Centralized configuration and env/default resolution for tooling

vox-container.role: OCI container runtime abstraction (Docker and Podman)

vox-corpus.role: Training data contracts, corpus SSOT, and Mens dataset metadata

vox-db.role: Codex / VoxDB relational store, schema, migrations, and typed SQL ops

vox-dei.role: Orchestrator-facing DEI integration surface (minimal workspace crate)

vox-doc-pipeline.role: Documentation lint and summary pipeline over repo markdown

vox-eval.role: Eval matrix helpers and scoring utilities for Mens/CI

vox-forge.role: Platform-agnostic Git forge API (GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, Forgejo)

vox-git.role: Pure-Rust Git bridge using gix (no libgit2)

vox-grammar-export.role: Grammar export: EBNF, GBNF, JSON Schema, and related artifacts

vox-install-policy.role: SSOT constants for install/update surfaces and release coordinates

vox-integration-tests.role: Cross-crate integration tests and contract validation

vox-jsonschema-util.role: Shared JSON Schema compile + validate helpers

vox-lsp.role: Language Server Protocol frontend: diagnostics, hover, completion, code lens

vox-ludus.role: Gamification layer: companions, quests, battles, and AI integration

vox-mcp.role: MCP server exposing the Vox orchestrator to coding agents

vox-mcp-meta.role: MCP registries, taxonomy structs, and enums for Corpus/MCP

vox-mcp-registry.role: Compile-time MCP tool registry from contracts YAML (SSOT)

vox-openai-sse.role: OpenAI-compat SSE reassembly and chat completion delta extraction

vox-openai-wire.role: OpenAI-compatible chat completions JSON types (non-streaming wire)

vox-oratio.role: Speech-to-text (Candle Whisper STT) and transcript refinement

vox-orchestrator.role: Multi-agent task queue, routing, and orchestration core

vox-populi.role: Populi mesh, HTTP control plane, Mens Burn/Candle native ML

vox-primitives.role: Dependency-neutral id and backoff helpers shared across crates

vox-project-scaffold.role: Vox.toml + main.vox + skill scaffolding for init and MCP

vox-protocol.role: JSON-line RPC envelopes and shared serde protocol types

vox-repository.role: Repository discovery, stable identity, layout probes, agent scope

vox-runtime.role: Vox language runtime: actors, stdlib, optional Codex connection

vox-scaling-policy.role: Compile-time and runtime accessors for scaling SSOT (policy.yaml)

vox-schola.role: Standalone ML training/serving binary (Mens QLoRA / Candle)

vox-scientia-api.role: Scientia API surface helpers for CLI and MCP

vox-scientia-core.role: Scientia publication models, preflight, and worthiness APIs

vox-scientia-social.role: Scientia social and graph-adjacent shared types

vox-search.role: Local-first retrieval: memory hybrid, repo inventory, Codex chunks, policy

vox-skills.role: Skill marketplace and plugin architecture for agents

vox-socrates-policy.role: Socrates anti-hallucination thresholds and risk classification

vox-ssg.role: Static site generation pipeline using vox-compiler

vox-tensor.role: Burn-backed tensor utilities and optional training kernels

vox-test-harness.role: Compiler and integration test harness utilities

vox-tools.role: In-process execution of a subset of Vox MCP tools

vox-webhook.role: HTTP webhook gateway for the Vox agent system

vox-workflow-runtime.role: Interpreted workflow execution (local + Mens activity hooks)

workspace-hack.role: Hakari workspace-hack unified dependency feature unification
